---
title: "Emily Lawrence"
---

## Emily Lawrence

**Dates:** 1831/2-1914

### Description

SPG missionary at Tamatave, Madagascar.

### Biography

She was the founder of several girls\' schools in Madagascar, and was invalided home by the SPG in 1899. She had also worked in Mauritius. She died in an SPG hostel in Worthing. Death announcement, <i>The Times</i> (14 October 1914).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 10th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
